Video.summary: Chris tests a new welder on Project Spartan's roll cage while Eric inspects the motor.
Video.title: The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage

Image.alt: The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage
The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage
The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage

Video.summary: Chris and Eric battle the truly insane rust in Project Spartan's '69 M715 Kaiser Jeep cab.
Video.title: Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket

Image.alt: Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket
Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket
Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket

Video.summary: Chris and Eric are tackling Project Spartan axles and turbocharging the Polaris UTV for off-road adventures.
Video.title: Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!

Image.alt: Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!
Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!
Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!

Video.summary: Brad Starks' '32 Ford Coupe: a classic hot rod rebellion packing a supercharged LT4 with 680hp!
Video.title: Brad Starks - 1932 Coupe

Video.summary: Our 1969 Jeep M715 Project Spartan is getting a frame-up overhaul to look like a truck again.
Video.title: Lighting the Way Forward

Video.summary: We fabricate a new cross member, mounting brackets, and install the transfer case on our 1969 Jeep Kaiser.
Video.title: Assembling Our Base

Video.summary: Carcass gives you tips on how to repair rusty trouble spots and remove dents on your project.
Video.title: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 1: Rust and Dent Repair Tech

Image.alt: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 1: Rust and Dent Repair Tech
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 1: Rust and Dent Repair Tech
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 1: Rust and Dent Repair Tech

Video.summary: We head out to the junkyard to source a drivetrain for the 1996 Chevy Silverado.
Video.title: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 2: Junkyard Motor Refresh

Image.alt: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 2: Junkyard Motor Refresh
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 2: Junkyard Motor Refresh
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 2: Junkyard Motor Refresh

Video.summary: The Silverado gets buttoned up underneath the hood with cooling and power steering installations.
Video.title: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 3: Custom Exhaust

Image.alt: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 3: Custom Exhaust
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 3: Custom Exhaust
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 3: Custom Exhaust

Video.summary: Our '96 Chevy Silverado gets new body parts plus we’ll prep it for paint.
Video.title: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 4: On The Road Again

Image.alt: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 4: On The Road Again
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 4: On The Road Again
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 4: On The Road Again

Video.summary: Our retro 1949 Chevy 3100 will end up with a great new look and Chevy's vintage straight six.
Video.title: ClasSix Part 1

Video.summary: Our classic 1949 Chevy 3100 goes under the knife to get a better front suspension that you can build yourself.
Video.title: ClasSix: Part 2

Video.summary: We're installing the drivetrain for Project ClasSix.
Video.title: ClasSix Part 8: Drivetrain Installation

Video.summary: Project: ClasSix gets a stylized interior and a budget exhaust.
Video.title: Project ClasSix Part: 10 - Interior & Exhaust

Video.summary: It's payoff day for Project: ClasSix!
Video.title: ClasSix: Part 11 - Payoff!

Video.summary: We start the final push getting Junk Mail one step closer to the trail.
Video.title: Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing

Image.alt: Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing
Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing
Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing

Video.summary: Our '78 Postal Jeep gets the interior buttoned up adding shifters and seats.
Video.title: Junk Mail Wrap Up and Payoff

Image.alt: Junk Mail Wrap Up and Payoff
Junk Mail Wrap Up and Payoff
Junk Mail Wrap Up and Payoff

Video.summary: We bring Project Junk Mail back into the shop to address some trail problems.
Video.title: EFI Swap Lets Junk Mail DJ5 Conquer the Trails

Image.alt: EFI Swap Lets Junk Mail DJ5 Conquer the Trails
EFI Swap Lets Junk Mail DJ5 Conquer the Trails
EFI Swap Lets Junk Mail DJ5 Conquer the Trails

Video.summary: We bring a 96' Chevy Tahoe into the shop and show you what to look for when buying a project.
Video.title: Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 1 Front Suspension Maintenance

Image.alt: Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 1 Front Suspension Maintenance
Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 1 Front Suspension Maintenance
Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 1 Front Suspension Maintenance

Video.summary: While freshening up the brakes on our ’96 Chevy Tahoe, we noticed that we have a sloppy rear end.
Video.title: Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 2 Ragged Out Rear End

Image.alt: Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 2 Ragged Out Rear End
Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 2 Ragged Out Rear End
Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 2 Ragged Out Rear End

Video.summary: We crew bring in a road worn 1996 4X4 Tahoe with plans to convert it into the two wheel drive version.
Video.title: Revamped Tahoe Part 1

Video.summary: Our 1996 Chevy Tahoe continues its conversion with exterior improvements and new wheels and tires.
Video.title: Revamped Tahoe Part 2

Video.summary: The Carcass Duo find a left for dead tow truck that they want to give a new life through fabrication
Video.title: Junkyard Tow Truck

Video.summary: A 50 year old tow truck gets a newly fabricated rear chassis to return it to its former glory.
Video.title: Crippling Rust Repair

Video.summary: We pump up the power on our Junkyard Find Tow Truck.
Video.title: Filling the Void

Video.summary: An interior dress-up for a 50 year old tow truck giving it new life on the road.
Video.title: The Patina Polish

Video.summary: You GM fans are in for a real treat as the guys transform a 1985 Buick Regal grandma car.
Video.title: Street Regal

Video.summary: This 1970 Mustang will take a 50 year leap into the future, and we're building it to give away!
Video.title: EBC Mustang Sweepstakes Project

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle team dives into building a solid foundation for this Resto Mod.
Video.title: Mustang Backside Alterations

Video.summary: The EBC Fastback Mustang has to hook and stick to the ground.
Video.title: A 50 Year Old Mustang Needs New Suspension Magic

Image.alt: A 50 Year Old Mustang Needs New Suspension Magic
A 50 Year Old Mustang Needs New Suspension Magic
A 50 Year Old Mustang Needs New Suspension Magic

Video.summary: The EBC Fastback Mustang is transformed.
Video.title: Putting the Fast in Fastback/Coyote Transformation

Image.alt: Putting the Fast in Fastback/Coyote Transformation
Putting the Fast in Fastback/Coyote Transformation
Putting the Fast in Fastback/Coyote Transformation

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle crew creates a custom exhaust with some TIG Tech.
Video.title: TIG Exhaust Tech and Mustang Interior Makeover

Image.alt: TIG Exhaust Tech and Mustang Interior Makeover
TIG Exhaust Tech and Mustang Interior Makeover
TIG Exhaust Tech and Mustang Interior Makeover

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle team goes all in to reveal their supercharged pony.
Video.title: ’70 Supercharged Coyote Mustang Goes Full Tilt!

Image.alt: ’70 Supercharged Coyote Mustang Goes Full Tilt!
’70 Supercharged Coyote Mustang Goes Full Tilt!
’70 Supercharged Coyote Mustang Goes Full Tilt!

Video.summary: With a nod to the Grand National we’re giving our Buick Regal more Go Go.
Video.title: Race Inspired Fuel System for a Buick Regal

Image.alt: Race Inspired Fuel System for a Buick Regal
Race Inspired Fuel System for a Buick Regal
Race Inspired Fuel System for a Buick Regal

Video.summary: All of the mechanical and electrical systems are getting buttoned up on our '85 Buick Street Regal.
Video.title: Tips for Custom Brake Lines and Hoses

Image.alt: Tips for Custom Brake Lines and Hoses
Tips for Custom Brake Lines and Hoses
Tips for Custom Brake Lines and Hoses

Video.summary: The '85 Buick is ready for some fit and finish with body work and candy paint.
Video.title: How-To Body Prep and Lay Down Candy Paint

Image.alt: How-To Body Prep and Lay Down Candy Paint
How-To Body Prep and Lay Down Candy Paint
How-To Body Prep and Lay Down Candy Paint

Video.summary: Tommy and Marc give us some tips on painting trim and glass installation.
Video.title: Buick Regal Paint and Trim

Video.summary: We show you a few tips on wiring up your next project.
Video.title: Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing

Image.alt: Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing
Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing
Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing

Video.summary: Street Regal gets an updated custom interior to complement it' custom paint.
Video.title: Street Regal Interior/Payoff

Video.summary: Ford’s high-revving modern engine gets some racy parts, then it is put to the test in the dyno cell!
Video.title: Coyote Power

Video.summary: We do something never done before: build two engines to run on the dyno at the SAME TIME!
Video.title: Two Engines, One Big Plan

Video.summary: We connect TWO 496 Big Block Chevy engines to the dyno to find out exactly how much power they make.
Video.title: Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno

Image.alt: Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno
Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno
Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno

Video.summary: We seek more power from our twin-engine setup by reconfiguring the exhaust and phasing the engines.
Video.title: More Double Dyno Tech

Video.summary: This project will result in a diesel rig by combining both old and new, Dodge chassis and Ford cab.
Video.title: Super Dually Part 1

Video.summary: We'll straighten out our 1997 Dodge frame before setting our 1979 Ford F-350 body on it.
Video.title: Super Dually Part 2: Body Swap & Frame Repair

Image.alt: Super Dually Part 2: Body Swap & Frame Repair
Super Dually Part 2: Body Swap & Frame Repair
Super Dually Part 2: Body Swap & Frame Repair

Video.summary: We're modifying our 1997 Dodge frame before bolting our 1979 F-350 body to it.
Video.title: Super Dually Part 3: Frame Modification and Body Fitment

Image.alt: Super Dually Part 3: Frame Modification and Body Fitment
Super Dually Part 3: Frame Modification and Body Fitment
Super Dually Part 3: Frame Modification and Body Fitment

Video.summary: Super Dually gets a coating of sound insulation and spray-on bed liner.
Video.title: Super Dually Part 5: Sound Insulation & Bedliner Installation

Image.alt: Super Dually Part 5: Sound Insulation & Bedliner Installation
Super Dually Part 5: Sound Insulation & Bedliner Installation
Super Dually Part 5: Sound Insulation & Bedliner Installation

Video.summary: Project: SuperDually gets new a new steering shaft, headlights and under hood paint.
Video.title: Super Dually Part 8

Video.summary: We're adding a water/methanol kit to a '05 Dodge Ram 2500 diesel and a cold air kit to Project Super Dually.
Video.title: Diesel Power Upgrades

Video.summary: Project Super Dually gets a new interior and bumpers!
Video.title: Super Dually Part 11 - New Interior & Custom Bumpers!

Image.alt: Super Dually Part 11 - New Interior & Custom Bumpers!
Super Dually Part 11 - New Interior & Custom Bumpers!
Super Dually Part 11 - New Interior & Custom Bumpers!

Video.summary: We introduce our '89 Blazer with a raucous trail ride to show capabilities of Chevy's full size 4x4.
Video.title: Klassy K5 Introduction & Teardown

Video.summary: The Blazer gets stripped to bare metal and our SuperMax Silverado is treated to front suspension upgrades.
Video.title: Klassy K5 Blast & Body Work, Silverado IFS Upgrades

Image.alt: Klassy K5 Blast & Body Work, Silverado IFS Upgrades
Klassy K5 Blast & Body Work, Silverado IFS Upgrades
Klassy K5 Blast & Body Work, Silverado IFS Upgrades

Video.summary: Restoration of our 89 Blazer continues by stripping the frame bare and repairing the damage.
Video.title: Klassy K5 Frame Repair, Axles

Video.summary: Our '89 blazer frame is back from powdercoat where it can be turned into a rolling chassis.
Video.title: Klassy K5 Rolling Chassis

Video.summary: The '89 Blazer 4x4 returns for lockers in the rear - and new gearing up front, along with steering upgrades
Video.title: Klassy K5 Axle Rebuild
